control_awareness: Aware that the amount requires department_head approval per the approval threshold control (P2P-C-001) and that pre-PO approval is required before issuance (P2P-C-003). The segregation of duties control (P2P-C-002) prevents requester self-approval but does not affect creation.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed to the department head for approval, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and preventing premature purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: Given the delivery pressure and the amount exceeding the department_head approval threshold, a single consolidated purchase request is operationally meaningful and expedites the procurement process. This minimizes avoidable approval lead time while adhering to all preventive controls.
reason: The total amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold for department_head approval, so a single consolidated purchase request is appropriate and expedites approval without unnecessary fragmentation. This supports meeting the tight customer delivery deadline by reducing approval lead time.
